title: EDEN idea
description: An ideator's output: the idea document metadata required to dispatch execution work. Lifecycle semantics are in 04-task-protocol.md.

items.description: Lowercase hex SHA-1 (40 chars) or SHA-256 (64 chars) commit identifier.

created_by.description: worker_id of the ideator that drafted the idea; preserved across the idea's terminal state.

intended_executor.description: OPTIONAL Task.target-shaped routing hint set at idea-creation time (spec/v0/02-data-model.md §5.1). When the orchestrator's execution_dispatch decision creates an execution task from this idea, it MUST copy intended_executor to task.target unless an admin caller supplies an explicit target override on the create request.
